name: Pasta Carrot Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp fresh thyme or 2 tsp dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the vegetable stock to a boil in a large pot.
2. Reduce heat to medium-low and add the finely chopped carrots, celery stalks, minced garlic, crushed red pepper, and fresh or dried thyme.
3. Simmer until the vegetables are tender but not fully cooked through (about 10-15 minutes).
4. Add the red wine vinegar and season with freshly ground pepper.
5. Cook the pasta shells according to package instructions until al dente.
6. Drain the pasta shells and toss them into the vegetable mixture.
7. Serve and enjoy.
Makes 8 servings (Per serving 232 calories, 3 grams fat)
